_comment: Shared dashboard widget layout for the INU overview. 8-column grid; the map is a fixed 4x4 panning widget at (0,0) and the charts/gauges fill the columns to its right. `channel` matches channels.name (or "map"); `kind` overrides the DB widget type; col/row are 0-based; cols/rows are the cell span. Loaded by rust-egui (env RIDE_LAYOUT overrides the path); missing/invalid → the computed default seed.
